title: Understanding Momentum
text: Momentum is the product of mass and velocity. To find the momentum of an object, multiply its mass by its velocity.

title: Mass of the Box
text: The mass of the box is given as $$5$$ kg.

title: Velocity of the Box
text: The velocity of the box is the same as the skater's velocity, which is $$5$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$.

title: Calculate the Momentum
text: Use the formula for momentum: mass times velocity. What is the momentum of the box?
